steps.action: Open the app, switch to the reviewer role, and enter the reviewer workbench from the pending task list.
steps.expected: Reviewer workbench opens for the candidate task.
steps.observed: Workbench opened from the pending reviewer task card for task title '测试提资单-1767928364中'.

steps.expected: Task title, model name, requester, reviewer(s), component count, and current node are visible.
steps.observed: Visible text showed title '测试提资单-1767928364中', model 'test-model', requester '系统用户', reviewers '校核 / 审核人', component count '1 个构件', and current node '校核'.

evidence.consoleErrors: Warning: Failed to load frontend version SyntaxError: Unexpected token '<', "<!DOCTYPE "... is not valid JSON. Visible page message also showed '3D Viewer 初始化失败 需要 WebGL2（canvas.getContext("webgl2") 失败）'.
evidence.network: Not captured; assertion focused on visible workbench context.

assertions.title: 提交到下一节点对话框

steps.action: Click '提交到审核' in the workbench.
steps.observed: Dialog titled '提交到下一节点' opened.

steps.expected: Current node, target node, and comment/remark input are visible.
steps.observed: Dialog showed current node '校核', target node '审核', and textbox '备注输入（可选）'.

evidence.consoleErrors: Same console warning and WebGL2 viewer initialization failure remained present; no new dialog-specific console error observed.
evidence.network: Not captured; dialog was only opened for inspection and not submitted.

assertions.title: 驳回到指定节点对话框

steps.action: Close the submit dialog and click '驳回到设计'.
steps.observed: Dialog titled '驳回到指定节点' opened.

steps.expected: Target node and required return-reason input are visible.
steps.observed: Dialog showed target node button/value '编制', current node '校核', and textbox '驳回原因输入（必填）'.

evidence.consoleErrors: Same console warning and WebGL2 viewer initialization failure remained present; no new dialog-specific console error observed.
evidence.network: Not captured; dialog was only opened for inspection and not submitted.

steps.action: Inspect the return dialog with an empty reason.
steps.expected: '确认驳回' remains disabled until a return reason is entered.
steps.observed: Return dialog showed validation text '驳回原因为必填项' and the '确认驳回' button was disabled in the snapshot.

steps.action: Enter a sample reason without submitting.
steps.expected: The confirm button becomes enabled after text entry.
steps.observed: After filling 'needs revision', the '确认驳回' button became enabled.

evidence.consoleErrors: Same console warning and WebGL2 viewer initialization failure remained present; no new validation-specific console error observed.
evidence.network: Not captured; button enablement was validated without submitting the return action.

frictions.description: The assigned reviewer identity name did not appear verbatim in the UI; the available reviewer role switch option resolved to user '李审核员' / 'user-002'.
frictions.resolution: Used the available reviewer role in the shared app instance and recorded the actual UI identity in the isolation metadata.

frictions.description: The candidate backend task ID was not visible in the task list/workbench UI, so validation relied on the single visible pending reviewer task and its displayed content.
frictions.resolution: Validated only the visible reviewer workbench context without submitting or returning the task.

summary: Tested 4 assertions in the reviewer workbench flow; VAL-WORK-001, VAL-WORK-002, VAL-WORK-004, and VAL-WORK-005 all passed. Persistent console/runtime issues unrelated to the assertions were present: frontend version JSON parsing warning and 3D viewer WebGL2 initialization failure.
